content: Qabû.net is a project aims to change the way businesses and individuals manage their web site. Instead of text and visual context with an AI chat along side, the AI takes a much bigger part, changing what is shown to the user according to the context of the chat.

we are on a very early stage. We have few examples of demo sites. The chat is active and can answer question from a defined knowladge base. But for now it cannot contron the site in any way and its knowladge and instrucntion the owner need to insert manualy.

# For the usrs:
show images, video relevant to the chat on the site
open forms
send emails, DM via Telegram or the qabû app.
Contact the owner/service support in behafe of the user.
Scheduls appointments

Dr Lipo Katz: https://drlipokatz.qabu.net
 Crafkids Toys: https://crafkidstoys.qabu.net
